description_for_human: AI-powered regulatory analysis for prediction market traders. Real-time FOMC signals, SEC enforcement tracking, and regulatory event feeds.
description_for_model: Access regulatory intelligence for prediction markets. Use /v1/markets/discovery (free) to see all tracked markets, /v1/fed/calendar (free) for FOMC dates, /v1/markets/sample (free) for sample signal data. Paid endpoints require USDC payment on Base L2 via x402 protocol — call any paid endpoint to receive payment instructions in the 402 response.
